text: I feel like I am stepping into a space dedicated to intellect and curiosity—a sanctuary of thought and experimentation. The clean, modern lines of the architecture evoke clarity, while the vibrant exhibit wall hints at the wild unpredictability of research and discovery. I sense anticipation and a subtle reverence for how humans strive to make sense of their world. Here, I am surrounded by the creative energy of innovation, and I feel both grounded by the orderliness of my surroundings and invigorated by the challenge to think beyond.
